THE COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AND AGAINST HARRY WILLIAMS FOR POSSESION FORTWITH. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT AGAINST HARRY WILLIAMS. TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 05
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

COMPLAINT FILED: 11/23/93. #5 JDG DIANE WICK. CSR LESLIE GARBER. CLERK M SANCHEZ. 9:25AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, DAVID RAMOS. DEFTS NOT PRESENT. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUVELAS, PHILIP RENCHEN, BERRY WILLIAMS, HARRY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 169A LEXINGTON ST SF. $945.00 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,325.00, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT OF PSSESSION TO BE ISSUED IMMEDIATELY.
